ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "plate_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the plate used in the experiment */,
  "well" TEXT /* Identifier of the well where the cells are located */,
  "field" INTEGER /* Field number for categorization */,
  "elapsed_minutes" INTEGER /* Elapsed time in minutes since treatment began */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Type of treatment applied to the cells */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., 'in progress', 'completed', 'aborted') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_treatment FOREIGN KEY ("treatment") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_plate_id FOREIGN KEY ("plate_id") REFERENCES plates ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell count record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with this count */,
  "cell_count" INTEGER /* Total number of cells counted in the experiment */,
  "cell_count_T0" INTEGER /* Initial cell count at time 0 for normalization */,
  "cell_count_norm_T0" REAL /* Normalized cell count compared to time 0 */,
  "G1_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of cells in the G1 phase of the cell cycle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cell count was recorded */,
  "cell_count_method" TEXT /* Method used for cell counting (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "cell_count_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the cell count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_counts_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plates" (
  "plate_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the plate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plate type or usage */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the plate was created or prepared */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the plate manufacturer */,
  "lot_number" TEXT /* Lot number of the plate */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the plate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment applied */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_category" TEXT /* Category of the treatment (e.g., control, experimental) */,
  "treatment_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user conducting experiments */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with this note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text content of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., observation, result, issue) */,
  "note_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the note (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes describing the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_count_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell count being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes describing the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_count_versions_count_id FOREIGN KEY ("count_id") REFERENCES cell_counts ("count_id")
)
